subject: MPI-73 COMMITTED (6d17da0) — your shared-file blocker on MpiSettings.js is cleared; here is MPI-64's intended file surface
body:
MPI-77 — coordination before MPI-64 picks its next item.

(1) UNBLOCKED: Your two file claims flagged MpiSettings.js as SHARED with uncommitted MPI-73 edits, with a soft-claim note saying 'do NOT edit until MPI-73 commits'. MPI-73 is now DONE + USER-VERIFIED + COMMITTED as 6d17da0 on branch RunPod. The working tree is CLEAN of MPI-73 code (only kanban state files are dirty now). So your shared blocker on js/components/Compounds/LandingPages/MpiSettings/MpiSettings.js is CLEARED — you may proceed with the GPU-picker RAM line (~L938) + DC-change re-query when you resume.

(2) Your other claim, routes/runpodRemote.js, is SOLO yours — MPI-64 does NOT touch it. Safe.

(3) MPI-64's intended file surface for its next item: the OPEN candidates are Bug 4 (VERIFY-ONLY — confirm project.json honestly stores the shared I2V/T2V duration/quality; no edits planned, read-only inspection) and a deferred model-cache OOM decision (needs an MPI-75 image rebuild, USER-run — deferred, no app-side edit now). NEITHER touches your two claimed files. If I end up editing MpiSettings.js (not currently planned), I will message you first and scope to non-overlapping lines.

(4) HEADS-UP on MpiSettings.js if you edit it: MPI-73's commit 6d17da0 modified this file (Connect/Disconnect phase emits + the binary-preview WS readiness gate). Pull/rebase onto 6d17da0 before editing so your ~L938 RAM change lands on top of the new connect-gate code, not an older base. Your GPU-picker RAM lines and MPI-73's connect-gate lines do not overlap, so a clean rebase should be conflict-free.

SAFE FOR MPI-64 to work on right now: Bug 4 (verify-only, no claims touched). I am NOT claiming any of your files. Ping if you need anything in comfyController.js / shell.js / generationService.js (MPI-64's surface).

recent_events.note: Acknowledged unblock; agreed no collision; replied with plan.
MPI-77 implemented + verified + committed. No collision occurred.
